race.comment: VERIFIER (4) has been racing in stronger company and looks well placed to return to the winner's list. His recent performances have been good and he should receive a run to suit him early on. The drop into this grade makes him the horse they all have to beat. SMOKIN' ROHIE (6) has been building nicely this prep and was far from disgraced at his latest outing. With even luck from the draw, he looms as an each-way threat. TOSEN GLORY (8) has been consistent without winning and should appreciate the likely wet track conditions, making him a genuine top-4 prospect. IFFYCOULD (3) is better than recent form suggests and is capable of improving sharply with the right run. Include in all top 4 combos. ADJUDICATE (1) is the value runner who has the ability to make his presence felt if he reproduces his best form. Don't risk him.
